title: LabTrust Partner Calibration v0.1
description: Workload priors for benchmark tasks: arrival patterns, STAT rate. Fitted from aggregate operational data (no PII).

description.description: Optional human-readable description of calibration source

workload_priors.description: Priors for workload generation in benchmark tasks

arrival_mean_s.description: Mean arrival offset (seconds from episode start). Used with arrival_scale_s for sampling.

arrival_scale_s.description: Scale for arrival offset (e.g. half-width for uniform, or std for normal).

arrival_max_s.description: Optional cap for arrival_ts_s (clamp to [0, arrival_max_s]).

stat_rate.description: Fraction of specimens that are STAT (0–1).
